Wind Turbine Field Notes

The three-blade horizontal-axis turbine has a rated capacity of 2.5 megawatts
and a rotor diameter of 116 meters. Cut-in wind speed is 3 meters per second
and the cut-out speed is 25 meters per second.

Capacity factor at the coastal site averaged 41 percent over the reporting
year. Scheduled maintenance occurs twice per year, in spring and autumn.
